criteriaResults.evidence: Enemies object exists with spawn(), update(), and render() methods. Enemy system module (src/enemies.js) exports full enemy manager at 1279 lines.
5 Shroomba enemies in stage 1-1 with health=1, speed=1. Confirmed patrol movement: X position changed from 289 to 1154 over 30+ frames.

4 Thorn Vines in stage 1-2, stationary (speed=0). shootTimer ticks down correctly (91→60 in 30 frames). Projectiles tracked in Enemies.projectiles array. Fires thorn projectiles toward player when within 400px range.
5 Bark Beetles in stage 1-3 with health=1. Tile above beetle position (headRow) is TILE_SOLID (1), confirming ceiling attachment. Rendered upside-down via ctx.scale(facing, -1).
Player melee attack reduces enemy health: HP 1→0. Enemy hitFlash=8 confirms visual feedback. checkPlayerAttackCollisions() with state='attack' processes correctly.
Jump attack: HP 1→0, Player.vy=-10 (JUMP_ATTACK_BOUNCE constant), confirming bounce. Charge attack at 50px range: HP 1→0, confirming wider hitbox (CHARGE_ATTACK_RANGE=32 > ATTACK_RANGE=22).
Enemy contact reduces player HP from 3 to 2 and sets invincible=true. checkEnemyPlayerCollisions() calls Player.takeDamage() correctly.

Enemy count decreased from 7 to 3 (alive, non-dying) after setting health=0. Death state entered with deathTimer, enemy floats up, then spliced from array. Death particles spawn via Particles.particles.push().

Boss framework verified: health=5 (number), maxHealth=5 (number), phase=1 (number), vulnerable=false (boolean), attackPattern='shockwave' (string), patterns=['shockwave']. All required properties exist.
Elder Shroomba: HUD.bossActive=true, HUD.bossName='Elder Shroomba', HUD.bossMaxHP=5, attackPattern='shockwave'. Boss renders with mushroom cap, angry eyes, and phase 2 crown.
Vine Mother: HUD.bossMaxHP=6, HUD.bossName='Vine Mother', attackPattern='vine_sweep'. Stationary boss with vine tendril rendering.
Stag King: HUD.bossMaxHP=7, HUD.bossName='Stag King', patterns=['charge','ceiling_rocks']. Has both charge attack and ceiling rock drop patterns.
Boss defeat spawns 35 celebration particles (from 0). GameState transitions to STAGE_COMPLETE after 1500ms setTimeout. 30+ multi-color particles in radial burst pattern.
Vulnerability windows working correctly. Invulnerable (vulnerable=false): HP 5→5 (no damage). Vulnerable (vulnerable=true): HP 5→4 (1 damage). Boss vulnerability gating is the core mechanic.

Phase transition works: phase 1→2 when health dropped below 50% (HP=2/7). Boss AI checks b.health <= Math.floor(b.maxHealth * 0.5) at enemies.js:400. Phase 2 adds visual crown to Elder Shroomba and modifies attack patterns.
TILE_CRUMBLE at (35,16) in stage 1-2. After 90 frames with player standing on it, tile becomes TILE_EMPTY (0). Timer=45 frames (~0.75s). Particles spawn via spawnBlockBreak on collapse.
3 bounce pads in stage 1-1 at columns 26, 29, 32 (row 17). Sequence within 6 tiles of each other (26→29=3, 29→32=3). Creates traversal challenge to reach elevated platform at cols 30-34, row 10.
6 TILE_BREAKABLE tiles in stage 1-1 (cols 18-19, rows 14-16). Level.breakTile() converts to TILE_EMPTY (0) and spawns particles. Forms puzzle blocking passage at Section C (cols 18-22).
Stage 1-1 Canopy Trail: width=85 tiles (>=80), height=20. Spawn at (64,480), exit at (2624,512). Tutorial stage with progressive difficulty introduction.
Stage 1-2 Hollow Depths: width=125 tiles (>=120). 27 TILE_LADDER tiles across two ladder sections (cols 22-23 and col 70). Two wall jump shafts at cols 12-17 and 40-45.
Stage 1-3 Treetop Gauntlet: width=155 tiles (>=150). 6 moving platforms (>=3). Mix of horizontal and vertical movers spanning gaps throughout the level.

4 parallax layers: mountains (speed 0.05), far trees (0.15), mid trees (0.3), foreground leaves (0.5). All use forest palette (deep greens #0D1B0E to #4A8C3F). Camera.layers and Camera.parallaxLayers both expose 4 layers.

Forest tile palette confirmed in _drawSolidTile: COLORS.forest.leaf (#4A8C3F) for surface, COLORS.forest.bark (#8B6B3D) for sub-surface, COLORS.forest.shadow (#1A3A15) for depth, COLORS.forest.highlight (#C8E6A0) for surface top. Stippling hatching applied. Pixel sampling: 35/70 green, 28/70 brown pixels.
Coin totals: 1-1=15, 1-2=20, 1-3=25 (all match WorldMap.STAGES). Health pickups: 1-1=2, 1-2=2, 1-3=3 (all >=1).
Three distinct levels: 1-1=85 tiles, 1-2=125 tiles, 1-3=155 tiles. All different widths, none equals 140 (old test level).
Stage completion triggers STAGE_COMPLETE state via transitionTo(). GameState.setupStageComplete() records completion in save system and shows stage complete menu.
Enemy counts: 1-1=7 (5 shroomba), 1-2=7 (shroomba+thornvine), 1-3=8 (shroomba+barkbeetle). All >=3. Enemies positioned on appropriate tiles per behavior.

Boss arena trigger works: Level.bossTriggered=true, Enemies.boss exists, HUD.bossActive=true. Camera.locked=true, Camera.arenaLock=true, Camera.minX=2080. Arena wall placed at entrance to prevent retreat.
SaveSystem records: completedStages=['1-1'], bestTimes={'1-1':42.5}, coinRecords={'1-1':12}. All fields present and correct after WorldMap.completeStage() call.

All Sprint 2 movement mechanics intact: WALK_MAX_SPEED=5, RUN_MAX_SPEED=8, JUMP_FORCE=-10.5, COYOTE_FRAMES=6, JUMP_BUFFER_FRAMES=8, ATTACK_DURATION=9, CHARGE_TIME=60, WALL_SLIDE_SPEED=2. Player.update function exists.
All 7 states functional: TITLE, CONTROLS, WORLD_MAP, STAGE, PAUSED, GAME_OVER, STAGE_COMPLETE. transitionTo() and changeTo() methods work. Iris-wipe Transition system present.
WorldMap has 13 nodes. Node properties: stageId='1-1', name='Canopy Trail', unlocked=true, completed=false. Navigation between nodes works. STAGES definition has 13 entries with correct totalCoins.

details: Sprint 1: Canvas 960x540 present, game loop at 60fps (121 updates/2sec), no JS errors, tile system functional, physics/gravity working
Sprint 2: Run speed 1.6x walk (8/5), variable jump, wall slide, coyote time, jump buffer, melee attack, charge attack, health system, invincibility all verified
Sprint 3: State machine with 7 states, title screen, HUD system, pause/unpause, iris-wipe transitions, particle system all functional
Sprint 4: WORLD_MAP state, 13 nodes in 4 clusters, stage selection, collectible system, save/load, coin totals match definitions

designQuality.rationale: Forest palette consistently applied across tiles, parallax, and enemies per design spec. COLORS.forest.* used in solid tiles (leaf surface, bark sub-surface, shadow hatching). Enemy sprites are detailed Canvas drawings with personality (mushroom Shroomba, thorny vine with golden eye, bark beetle with animated legs). Boss vulnerability glow ring in Muted Gold matches design system. Boss health bar in HUD follows spec (centered, bottom). Phase 2 crown on Elder Shroomba. Design spec adherence is strong.

originality.rationale: Three distinct enemy behaviors (patrol, stationary shooter, ceiling walker) with three unique boss types each having different attack patterns. Boss phase transitions add depth. Forest theme carried through with cohesive naming (Shroomba, Thorn Vine, Bark Beetle, Elder Shroomba, Vine Mother, Stag King). Level design shows thoughtful variation: tutorial stage with breakable blocks, vertical exploration with ladders and wall jumps, and a moving-platform gauntlet.

codeQuality.rationale: Clean separation of concerns: Enemies module handles spawn/update/render with per-type dispatch. Boss AI uses state machine (intro→attacking→vulnerable→cycle) with per-type update methods. Hit cooldown system prevents duplicate hits. AABB collision shared between enemy and boss systems. Extensible architecture ready for future world enemies. Integration with existing systems (Particles, HUD, Camera.lockToArena, SaveSystem) is seamless.

uxPolish.rationale: Good game feel: hit flash on enemy damage, knockback on regular enemies, death particles on kill, 30+ celebration particles on boss defeat. Boss vulnerability indicated visually with pulsing gold ring. Camera locks to boss arena preventing retreat. Crumbling platforms shake before collapsing. Boss health bar appears on arena entry. Phase transition spawn particles for impact.

completeness.rationale: All 4 features fully delivered: enemy framework (3 types), boss framework (3 bosses with vulnerability/phases), puzzle mechanics (crumble/bounce/breakable), and 3 complete World 1 stages with unique layouts (85/125/155 tiles). Every criterion passes. Save integration, collectible placement, exit zones, and boss arenas all implemented. Debug API extended for testing.

performance.rationale: Viewport culling for tiles and enemies. Game loop maintains 60fps (121 updates in 2 seconds measured). No JavaScript errors. Projectile cleanup when off-screen. Enemy culling when off-camera. Fixed timestep with spiral-of-death prevention.

notes: Sprint 5 is the highest-complexity sprint yet, delivering three major systems (enemies, bosses, puzzles) plus three complete playable stages. All 32 criteria pass. All regression checks against sprints 1-4 pass. The enemy and boss frameworks are well-architected and extensible for future worlds. Forest palette is consistently applied throughout. Boss fights have genuine gameplay depth with vulnerability windows, phase transitions, and diverse attack patterns. The implementation quality matches the ambition of the sprint scope.
